rules.instruction: Ensure all Markdown files follow professional whitepaper structure: include a clear title (H1), subtitles (H2-H3), a table of contents if long, bullet lists instead of paragraphs longer than 8 lines, and English technical tone. Automatically fix inconsistent capitalization, extra spaces, or punctuation issues.

Ensure Go source code files use consistent formatting: correct indentation (tabs = 1), English comments, exported function docstrings in GoDoc style, and logical grouping of imports (standard, external, internal).
Globally enforce consistent line endings (LF), remove trailing whitespaces, and ensure every file ends with a newline character. Maintain English as the default project language.
